data.title: Celestia (TIA) price at $1.82 holds, facing key support test at $1.47. Mixed signals with neutral RSI and potential MACD weakness.
data.description: The price of TIA cryptocurrency remains stable at $1.82 amid a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI), but there are signals of potential weakness indicated by the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD). The critical support level at $1.47 is set to undergo a test as bearish sentiment persists, hinting at a possible deeper correction in the near future.

data.title: Scania's sales revenue declined by 10% to SEK 49.9 billion, operating result down to SEK 4.5 billion in Q2 2025.
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, as of July 25, 2025, the Scania Group is experiencing strategic advancements despite a decrease in demand. Sales revenue for the company has dropped by 10 percent to SEK 49.9 billion compared to the previous figure of SEK 55.4 billion. The adjusted operating result stands at SEK 4.5 billion, a noticeable decline from the prior figure of SEK 8.0 billion. Additionally, the adjusted return on sales has decreased to 9.0 percent from 14.5 percent. The company is focused on enhancing its vehicle offerings amidst these challenging market conditions.

data.title: JackBit Bitcoin Casino has 8000+ games, awarded "Fastest Crypto Casino of 2025" by leading iGaming review outlets worldwide.
data.description: JackBit, a crypto gambling brand launched in 2022, has been named the "Fastest Crypto Casino of 2025" by over 50 iGaming review outlets. Licensed by the Curaçao Gaming Control Board and operated by Ryker B.V., JackBit offers various gambling options like sports betting, slots, live dealer games, and mini-games, attracting a global audience with secure technology and fast transactions. The platform hosts around 7,000 games, including 6,600 slot games, 200 live casino titles, and a wide range of sports betting options covering 82,000+ live events and extensive e-sports choices. With over 80 software providers, JackBit offers a mix of classic and innovative games, making it stand out in the bitcoin casino sector.

data.title: Positive CHMP opinion for Pfizer & BioNTech's LP.8.1-adapted COVID-19 vaccine in EU; for individuals 6+ to prevent SARS-CoV-2.
data.description: Pfizer Inc. and BioNTech SE have received a recommendation from the European Medicines Agency’s CHMP for marketing authorization of their adapted monovalent COVID-19 vaccine, COMIRNATY ® LP.8.1, targeting the LP.8.1 variant for individuals aged 6 months and older. The EMA’s Emergency Task Force advised updating vaccines for the 2025-2026 season to combat the evolving SARS-CoV-2 virus, stating that this adaptation will enhance vaccine efficacy. This move signifies a significant step in the ongoing efforts to prevent COVID-19, as the virus continues to mutate.

data.title: AAVE price tests $285 support post $50B TVL surge. Bearish trend at $285.26, key levels signal possible drop to $269.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $285.26 and is experiencing a bearish trend, despite its Total Value Locked (TVL) recently reaching a milestone of $50 billion. Analysis of key technical levels indicates a possible decline towards a support level of $269.

data.title: Temenos, a fintech company, recognized by CNBC as a top enterprise fintech in 2025, among 2000 global companies.
data.description: In Grand-Lancy, Switzerland, Temenos, a banking technology leader, was listed in CNBC's World's Top Fintech Companies for 2025 in the Enterprise Fintech category. The significant accolade, created with research firm Statista, highlights the top fintech firms influencing financial services. Temenos stood out after a thorough review of over 2,000 global fintech companies.

data.title: Tributes for wrestling legend Hulk Hogan and rocker Ozzy Osbourne rise as they both passed away, aged 71 and 76.
data.description: Renowned professional wrestler Hulk Hogan, whose real name is Terry Bollea, tragically passed away in a hospital on Thursday at the age of 71. This news comes shortly after the death of musician Ozzy Osbourne, who died at the age of 76.
